questions.question: What `stop_reason` value indicates that Claude has finished and will not request any more tool calls?
After Claude returns a `tool_use` block, what message must you add to the conversation before calling `messages.create` again?

options.A: A new `user` message with the tool's input
options.B: A `user` message containing a `tool_result` block with the tool's output
options.C: A `system` message describing the tool result
options.D: Nothing — the SDK handles it automatically

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT listed as a property of a well-designed tool?

options.B: Idempotent — safe to call multiple times
options.D: Typed — uses JSON Schema to define inputs

How do you install the Anthropic SDK using uv?
